steps.title: Track the public-domain order
steps.content: The student needs the sequence in which the two works entered the public domain. The notes give 2020 for Billy Budd, Sailor and 2021 for The Common Reader, so the answer must make that order explicit.

steps.title: Require both dates in sequence
steps.content: A and D say both works are now public domain but omit the order. B mentions 2021 and blurs the timing of both expirations. The option that says one work entered in 2020 and the other followed in 2021 emphasizes sequence. The answer is C.
